states.name: Rei
states.title: Sakura Onmyoji
states.description: Once every decade, the sakura of Kisenkyo bloom and the Great Sage makes her appearance. Every time, she hears the whispers: "Betrayer." "Traitor." She says nothing, for she knows this is only what she deserves. Every decade, she witnesses Kisenkyo's peace, its prosperity, and their weight of her unforgiven sin.

states.name: Rei
states.title: Sakura Onmyoji
states.description: The reddish light of the setting sun, the scent of flowers and trees, and her mother's laugh. This is Rei's happiest memory, from when her father still watched over Kisenkyo. To her, an outsider, her mother was her only friend. With her mother a thousand years dead and gone, Rei wondered if she would ever laugh like that again.

states.name: Rei
states.title: Sakura Onmyoji
states.description:
"Finn, won't you bathe with me?"
"S-sorry, what?"
"I'm told that serious discussions should be had while baring all to one another."
"But—"
"Sage Rei! The women's and men's baths are separate!"
"Oh, really?"
"What a shame that is, Sir Finn."
"N-Nagi!"
"..."
"E-Elmina?"
"So nice to see you two getting along..."
